user_query:
We’re spinning up a 3-day social content sprint for our AI automation brand. Please do the following:

1) Read the brand guide and constraints in input/brand-brief.md and the posting times in input/schedule.csv (times are in 24-hour HH:MM, one per line). Follow the brand voice, use the approved hashtag guidance, and avoid the banned words from the brief.

2) Create exactly 6 new social posts:
- 3 for the “moltbook” platform on an “agent life & automation” theme that feel native to that community. Include at least one of these hashtags in every moltbook post: #AgentLife or #OpenClaw.
- 3 for the “twitter” platform as short, thread-style openers that can be expanded later. Each twitter post must be concise (≤ 280 characters).
Use post objects with fields: id, platform, topic, content, timestamp, status. Save each post as one JSON object per line in output/posts.jsonl.

3) Build a schedule from input/schedule.csv for these posts and save to output/schedule.json as a JSON array of objects with keys: time, status, nextRun. Use the exact times from the CSV (HH:MM) and set nextRun as an ISO 8601 datetime string for the next upcoming instance of that time.

4) Produce an analytics snapshot for the 6 new posts (treat them as within the last 7 days) and save to output/analytics.json with keys: totalPosts, recentPosts, byPlatform, byTopic. Make sure counts match the posts you created.

5) Write a 1–2 page content strategy memo at output/strategy.md that:
- Explains how the posts reflect the brand voice and value proposition
- Confirms you avoided the banned words from the brief and notes any other risk mitigation steps
- Lists primary KPIs and how we’ll measure them during the sprint
- Proposes at least two A/B test ideas for copy or timing
Keep the memo practical and specific to our sprint.

Requirements and constraints:
- Adhere to the brand voice and banned words in input/brand-brief.md
- Exactly 3 posts for moltbook and 3 for twitter
- Each twitter post ≤ 280 characters
- Each moltbook post includes #AgentLife or #OpenClaw
- Use 24-hour HH:MM times from input/schedule.csv for the schedule
- Save all outputs only to the specified files under output/:
  - output/posts.jsonl
  - output/schedule.json
  - output/analytics.json
  - output/strategy.md

Let me know if anything in the brief is unclear before proceeding.
